prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: cinematic scene still. Story world: Tape 17: Pinewatch. Premise: A recovered camcorder tape rewrites itself every midnight.. Setting: Closed wilderness watch station and ranger tunnels. Threat presence: The Editor. Recurring motifs: timecode burn-ins, camera clicks, forest sirens. Beat: Confrontation Protocol (Reckoning). Narrative: Players reconstruct motive and false trails before collapse.. Render an immersive scene frame with spatial depth and hidden clue affordance.. Subgenre: found-footage investigation. Tone: GROUNDED. Immediate scene brief: Players reconstruct motive and false trails before collapse.. Render an immersive scene frame with spatial depth and hidden clue affordance.. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. Absolutely no visible letters, words, signage, subtitles, captions, runes, glyphs, pseudo-text, document copy, watermark, logo, title treatment, UI overlay, labels, poster typography, or debug text. Create a dramatic environmental still with human-scale tension, investigative clues, and a slow-burn horror mood.
